cashier.title: Cashier
cashier.description: An authenticated or localized cashier agent responsible for payout distribution in the field

name.description: Full Arabic name of the cashier

isActive.description: Whether this cashier is currently authorized to disburse funds

payoutPoint.description: Specific geographic or tactical site assignment (e.g. مقر الرويس)

individual.title: Individual
individual.description: Recipient details and military payout criteria

militaryId.description: Unique military identifier (الرقم العسكري) of the individual, serving as Firestore Document ID

fullName.description: Full Arabic name of the military officer/individual

entitledAmount.description: Assigned disbursement amount in SAR or local currency

payoutStatus.description: The distribution state of individual's benefits

lastReceivedDate.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent payout

assignedCashierId.description: Cashier ID assigned to this individual in case of dedicated payout mode. If empty, any cashier can pay.

receivedCashierId.description: Cashier who performed the payout delivery

receivedCashierName.description: Name of the cashier who performed the payout

receivedLocation.description: GPS geographical latitude and longitude values of disbursement

receivedDevice.description: Device platform string and browser agent data used

operationLog.title: Operation Log
operationLog.description: System transaction log for auditing, modification, backups, payouts and edits

individualId.description: Foreign key to the military individual

individualName.description: Arabic full name of the military individual

cashierId.description: Cashier ID responsible for the action

location.description: GPS coordinates at the moment of registration

performedBy.description: Role performing the operations, either cashier or admin

details.description: Arabic textual explanation of operational alterations

/individuals/{militaryId}.description: Collection of military individuals eligible for disbursement

/operations/{operationId}.description: Audit trails for monitoring and reconciling double attempts or overrides
